text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: One day, while I'm watching a race...

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Aaand... we have our winner! Here<n>she is, the
victory of a truly intense<n>dead heat!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Fantastic! Races are so thrilling! While<n>I am here,
I should take a photo to<n>commemorate the
occasion!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Oh, you there! Would you be so kind<n>as to take
my photo?

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Yes! Please make sure you capture<n>the racetrack
as well! Thank you!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I can barely keep up with what's<n>happening, but
I take Fine Motion's<n>picture anyway.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Goodness, what a lovely photo! This<n>is worthy of
three reminiscent clovers!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
I adore clovers, so I use them to rate<n>any
wonderful experiences I have.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
I want to gather as many clovers as I<n>can here
before I return to Ireland.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
The world outside the castle walls is<n>so free and
fascinating! I do not often<n>have experiences like
these, so I take<n>many photos when I do.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Say, where do you think I should go<n>next for
some more lovely photo<n>opportunities?

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Ah, the spot where the goal enters<n>the racers'
sight, and they begin to<n>calculate when to make
their final<n>move! A fine suggestion!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
The sight of all the Umamusume<n>rounding the
corner is always so<n>delightfully impactful! It
never ceases<n>to take my breath away!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Yes, if I can take a clear shot from<n>that location,
I'm sure it will make for<n>a wonderful memory!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Ah, the looks on their faces as they<n>strive
desperately forward with their<n>final ounces of
energy!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Surely, there is no scene more worthy<n>of being
immortalized! My heart is<n>racing in anticipation!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
I must find a location where I can<n>capture a clear
shot. I wonder if that<n>spot over there will be
good?
